# Product Architect UI Package

## Runtime
I will always be running the app in the background, so no need to run `npm run dev` here. Instead, focus on making code changes and saving them. The main app will pick up changes automatically.

## Foundation
See the main README.md for foundational details. Add any foundational docs to the /docs folder. The entire architecture is data → render. The components don't know what they're building—they just execute whatever the configuration tells them to render.

## Features
For each feature, refer to the relevant documentation in the /docs folder.
